format_hint_text: The code will be sent as a text message — recipient can copy & paste it.
format_hint_both: A QR image with the greeting, code and message printed on it. After sending the image, you can copy just the code (for pasting elsewhere) from the next dialog.
delete_record_body: Delete this record? The code will be removed entirely (the customer is kept).
reset_all_body: Permanently delete ALL codes, customers, categories, and history? This cannot be undone.
reset_all_confirm_body: Last chance. This action is permanent.
join_ack_body: You joined the team. To complete the handshake, send a small confirmation file back to {name}. They'll then know you're ready to receive codes and vouchers.
join_ack_later: You can send the join confirmation later from Settings → Team
phone_too_short: Phone number looks too short. Include country code.
wa_invite_greeting: Hi! {sender} is inviting you to join the "{team}" team in the codes. app.
wa_invite_instructions: In the codes. app, go to Settings → Team → Join team → paste the text below:
not_in_team: You are not in a team — this verification can't be applied
different_team: This verification is for a different team
only_master_handles_join: Only Owner can accept team-join confirmations
leave_team_body: Your codes stay on this phone, but you lose the team key. Cannot be undone unless you have a team backup.
left_team_toast: Left team — back to solo mode
wa_voucher_footer: I'll send the QR image in a moment.
app_not_installed: {name} is not installed — opening share sheet instead
share_app_failed: Direct share failed — opening share sheet instead
share_unsupported: Sharing is not supported on this device
voucher_marked_uncertain: Marked uncertain — check with customer later
iap_unavailable: In-app purchase is not available on this device — try the latest version from the store.
purchase_no_entitlement: Purchase completed but entitlement not granted. Tap Restore to retry.
no_prior_purchase: No prior purchase found for this account. If you bought Pro on another device, make sure you are signed in with the same Apple ID / Google account.
paywall_reason_default: Unlock the full app: team mode, bulk distribution, partner database, unlimited codes.
paywall_reason_codes: Free tier is limited to {limit} codes and vouchers total. You have {count}; this would add {add}. Unlock Pro for unlimited.
paywall_reason_team: Team mode is a Pro feature. Unlock to invite teammates and share codes securely.
paywall_reason_bulk: Bulk distribution to partners is a Pro feature. Unlock to send batches.
paywall_reason_partners: Partner database is a Pro feature. Unlock to track partner businesses you distribute to.
demo_reload_body: Practice data was already loaded once. Loading again will create DUPLICATE sample categories, codes, and contacts. Are you sure?
demo_load_body: Load practice data? This will add ~300 sample codes, 3 voucher templates, sample vouchers, and a few sample contacts to your app.
practice_data_loaded: Practice data loaded — try it out!
pro_unlocked_thanks: Pro unlocked — thank you for supporting!
pro_unlocked_dev: Pro unlocked (dev) — tap to test locked UI
free_tier_usage: Free tier — {count} of {limit} codes & vouchers used · Tap to upgrade
qr_not_loaded: QR library not loaded. Sharing text instead.
give_many_text_hint: All codes as a text list — one message. Recipient can copy & paste each code.
give_many_both_hint: All codes as QR images (with greeting, code & message printed on each). All images shared together in one go.
open_with_failed: Could not read the file. Try saving it to Downloads and importing manually from Settings.
not_ready: App not ready yet — try again
settings_help_sub: Animated walkthrough of the recommended workflows
settings_team_setup_sub: Share codes between phones in a small team
settings_team_send_sub: Build a .pcm package for one of your team members
settings_team_receive_sub: Import a .pcm transfer or confirmation file
settings_status_report_sub: Send Owner a snapshot of your inventory and activity
settings_bulk_distribute_sub: Hand a batch of codes or vouchers to a partner
settings_load_demo_sub: Sample codes and vouchers to practice with
settings_iap_diagnostic_sub: Tap to view details from the last purchase or restore
settings_export_csv_sub: Spreadsheet-friendly, one row per code given
settings_unlock_pro_sub: Team mode, bulk distribution, partner database
settings_qr_encodes_sub: Off: QR contains just the code
settings_auto_backup_sub: Saves a copy after each change (Capacitor only)
lead_voucher_generation: Each generated voucher gets a unique ID (e.g. VCH-A4F2…). They go into your pool ready to be issued to customers.
lead_give_many: Hand several codes from this category to one customer. Different from a Partner bulk distribution (which is for distributors who'll redistribute on your behalf).
lead_categories: Group your codes by app, platform, or campaign. Each category is its own pool.
lead_voucher_template_note: Snapshotted into each issued voucher. Editing later doesn't change vouchers already issued.
lead_import_history: Every batch of codes you've added — by paste, CSV, or restore.
lead_team_mode: Set up a team to share codes between phones without a server. One person is Owner and loads all codes; others are Distributors who only receive codes via team transfers.
lead_create_team: You'll be Owner of this team. Save the team backup file somewhere safe — it's the only way to recover if your phone is lost.
lead_join_team: Scan the invite QR from a teammate's phone. They'll show one from their Team management screen.
lead_invite_phone: Include country code. WhatsApp opens with the invite ready to send.
lead_send_codes: Codes leave your phone immediately. Recipient confirms by sending a confirmation back. You can recall if they never confirm.
lead_daily_status: Send a snapshot of your inventory and activity to Owner. Aggregate counts only — no customer names cross phones.
lead_redeem_voucher: Scan the QR on the customer's voucher (paper or digital).
lead_printer: Connect a Bluetooth ESC/POS thermal receipt printer (58mm or 80mm) to print paper vouchers. Optional — vouchers can also be shared digitally only.
lead_bulk_distribute: Hand a batch of codes or vouchers to a partner who will redistribute them. Owner / solo only.
lead_add_partner: A partner is a distributor or company you give bulk batches to. Different from a regular customer — duplicate-customer warnings are suppressed for partners.
lead_vouchers_ready: Each voucher has its own QR. Partner prints or forwards electronically. Customer brings it back, you scan to redeem.
lead_bulk_batches: All bulk batches you've distributed to partners. Tap a batch for actions.
lead_history: All codes / vouchers from the active category. Tap any item for details.
lead_disconnected: Share this acknowledgment file with Owner so they can update their roster.
lead_unlock_pro: One-time purchase. No subscriptions. Everything stays offline.
lead_category_picker: Pick a category to filter your codes.
lead_branding_header: Shown as a small header above the app title. Leave blank to hide.
lead_demo_data: Set up sample categories, codes, and vouchers so you can practice the app's features.
lead_preferred_app_note: Customer-facing shares (codes you send to recipients, voucher images) always use the full system share sheet, so you can pick any channel — SMS, email, WhatsApp, print, etc.
lead_language: Choose your preferred language. The app will fall back to English for any text that hasn't been translated yet.
label_invite_wa_phone: Or send via WhatsApp to teammate's phone (optional)
ph_voucher_terms: e.g. Valid for one oil change service. Labour included, parts not included.
ph_voucher_internal_note: Any internal note about this voucher
ph_pick_teammate: Pick or type a teammate's name
ph_partner_notes: e.g. Workshop in Berlin, contact Maria
btn_force_remove: Force remove from my roster only
btn_recall_codes: Recall — codes return to your pool
btn_show_invite_qr: Show invite QR for new member
btn_skip_explore: Skip — I'll explore on my own
welcome_intro: A small offline app for distributing promo codes and vouchers. No accounts. No tracking. Everything stays on this phone.
slave_blocked_msg: You're a Distributor — codes can only arrive via team transfers.
empty_customers_l2: They'll appear here when you start sharing codes.
help_basics_solo_body: Add codes to a category. Tap "Give next code" to assign one to a customer. The app remembers who got what so duplicates trigger a warning.
help_basics_categories_body: Each code belongs to a category. Filter the list, run separate reports per category, transfer batches to teammates by category.
help_basics_customers_body: When you give out a code, you can pick or create the customer. Phone and email are optional. Repeat customers trigger a duplicate warning that you can override with a note.
help_team_roles_body: One person creates the team and becomes Owner. Owner is the only one who can load new codes from CSV or paste. Up to 2 other people join as Distributors and only receive codes via team transfers.
help_team_pairing_body: Owner shows an invite QR. Distributors scan it from their phones. The QR contains a 256-bit team key — only show it to people you trust.
help_team_reports_body: Distributors get a daily reminder to send Owner a snapshot of their inventory and activity. Owner can see consolidated team reports.
help_transfer_send_body: Settings → Send codes to teammate. Pick a name, category, and quantity. The app builds an encrypted .pcm file you share via WhatsApp or any other channel.
help_transfer_confirm_body: When you send, the codes go into "pending transfer". Recipient imports the package → app prompts them to send a confirmation back. Once you receive that, codes flip to "transferred out".
help_transfer_recall_body: If the recipient never confirms (file lost, etc.), you can recall: codes return to your pool. WARNING: if they actually imported the package and you recall, you have duplicates. Only recall when you are SURE the package was lost.
help_voucher_mode_body: Set a category to "voucher" type. Configure a template: title, terms, expiry days. Each voucher you issue snapshots the template and gets a unique QR.
help_voucher_issue_body: Pick a customer, hit Issue. App generates a digital voucher (PNG with QR) you can share by WhatsApp or email. With a Bluetooth thermal printer connected, you can also print paper vouchers.
help_voucher_redeem_body: Customer returns months later with paper or digital voucher. Settings → no, actually a "Redeem voucher" button. Scan the QR. App confirms valid and marks redeemed. Tries to redeem twice? Rejected.
help_voucher_limit_body: Vouchers can only be redeemed on the phone that issued them. For multi-location workshops, a server-based version is needed. For single-cashier businesses, this works perfectly.
help_recovery_backup_body: The app saves a JSON backup to your phone's Documents folder after every change. If you reinstall, the app picks it up automatically on first launch.
help_recovery_export_body: Settings → Export full backup. Download a JSON file containing everything. Save it to email or cloud storage. After 14 days without an export, a reminder appears.
help_recovery_master_body: If the Owner phone is lost, restore from a team backup file on a new phone. The team key is preserved so existing Distributors continue to work without re-pairing. Treat the team backup file like a owner password.
settings_app_skin_sub: Switch between color themes — coming soon
hero_demo_sub: Sample codes & vouchers — fastest way to explore
hero_add_sub: Paste a list or import a CSV
hero_invite_sub: Join an existing team as a Distributor
toast_ack_is_for_a_different_team: Ack is for a different team
toast_backup_is_from_a_newer_version_of_: Backup is from a newer version of codes. — please update the app first.
toast_camera_scanning_needs_the_native_a: Camera scanning needs the native app — paste invite text below instead
Camera scanning needs the native app — type the voucher ID manually
toast_confirmation_does_not_match_any_ou: Confirmation does not match any outgoing transfer
toast_connect_a_printer_first_settings_v: Connect a printer first (Settings → Voucher printer)
toast_copied_paste_in_your_messaging_app: Copied — paste in your messaging app
toast_could_not_copy_long_press_the_code: Could not copy. Long-press the code to copy.
toast_could_not_prepare_share_falling_ba: Could not prepare share. Falling back to text.
toast_disconnect_file_is_for_a_different: Disconnect file is for a different team
toast_enter_a_count_of_1_or_more: Enter a count of 1 or more
toast_generate_is_only_available_for_vou: Generate is only available for voucher categories
toast_no_voucher_capacity_in_this_catego: No voucher capacity in this category. Owner allocates voucher slots via team transfers.
toast_no_vouchers_available_in_pool_gene: No vouchers available in pool — generate or import some first
toast_only_master_can_load_new_codes_sla: Only Owner can load new codes — Distributors receive codes via team transfers
toast_pasted_content_is_not_valid_invite: Pasted content is not valid invite JSON
toast_please_write_the_reason_for_sharin: Please write the reason for sharing again
toast_printer_scanning_needs_the_native_: Printer scanning needs the native app
toast_qr_did_not_contain_a_valid_invite: QR did not contain a valid invite
toast_qr_library_not_loaded_falling_back: QR library not loaded. Falling back to text.
toast_reason_for_sharing_again_is_requir: Reason for sharing again is required
toast_selected_contact_is_not_flagged_as: Selected contact is not flagged as partner
toast_synced_with_master_all_caught_up: Synced with Owner — all caught up
toast_team_backup_downloaded_store_it_sa: Team backup downloaded — store it safely
toast_this_disconnect_file_is_not_for_yo: This disconnect file is not for you
toast_use_bulk_distribute_for_issuing_ma: Use Bulk distribute for issuing many vouchers
toast_name_has_confirmed_disconnect_remo: {name} has confirmed disconnect — removed from roster
toast_name_was_not_in_your_roster_no_cha: {name} was not in your roster — no change
toast_maximum_limit_codes_per_batch_spli: Maximum {limit} codes per batch — split into multiple batches for more.
toast_maximum_max_item_per_batch_run_the: Maximum {max} {item} per batch. Run the flow again for the rest.
autobackup_native_only: Only works inside the native app (Capacitor + Filesystem plugin)
autobackup_off: Off · changes only saved to in-app storage
toast_marked_as_partner_bulk_enabled: Marked as partner — bulk distribution enabled
partner_add_first_hint: Add a partner first, then distribute a batch
cat_delete_body_nonempty: Delete "{name}"? Its {n} code{plural} will be moved to a new "(uncategorised)" category.
recall_body:
Recall {n} codes from {name}?

Only do this if you're SURE the recipient never imported the package. If they did, you'll have duplicates.
confirm_send_verified_body: {name} confirmed they joined. Send a small verification file back so they know you accepted them. Until they receive this, their phone's team-mode features stay disabled as a safety check.
toast_pairing_already_verified: Already verified by Owner — no change
toast_pairing_verified: Pairing verified — you can now receive codes from Owner
toast_member_not_verified: {name} hasn't completed pairing yet — wait for their join confirmation
toast_slaves_cannot_generate_vouchers: Only Owner can generate vouchers — you receive voucher capacity via team transfers
toast_recipient_not_in_roster: {name} is not in your team roster — pick an existing teammate
toast_mode_locked_awaiting_verify: Mode toggle locked — waiting for Owner to verify your pairing
toast_mode_locked_not_in_team: Mode toggle is available once you're in a team
toast_switch_to_team_mode_first: Switch to Team mode to send codes to teammates
toast_category_created_in_single: Category created in Single view — toggle to Single mode to see it
toast_already_in_team_create: Already in team "{name}" — only one team is allowed. Leave first to create a new one.
toast_already_in_other_team: Already enrolled in team "{name}" — only one team is allowed. Leave first to join a different one.
toast_already_in_this_team: Already enrolled in "{name}" — no need to scan again.
toast_already_in_team_restore: Already in team "{name}" — leave first to restore a different team backup.
toast_team_full: Team is full ({max} teammates max) — {name} cannot join. Remove a current teammate first.
toast_team_full_invite: Team is full ({max} teammates max) — remove a current teammate before inviting a new one.
leave_sheet_lead: This will disconnect your phone from the team. Your codes stay on this phone, but you lose the team key and won't receive future transfers. Cannot be undone unless you have a backup.
leave_backup_sub: A team backup lets you rejoin or restore your role if you change your mind.
leave_backup_sub_with_date: Last backup {date}. A team backup lets you rejoin or restore your role if you change your mind.
leave_backup_sub_never: You have never exported a backup. Without one, leaving cannot be undone.
leave_reduced_motion_btn: Yes, I am sure — leave team
clear_sheet_lead: This will permanently delete ALL codes, customers, categories, vouchers, history, and your team membership. Cannot be undone unless you have a backup.
clear_backup_sub: A backup lets you restore everything if you change your mind.
clear_backup_sub_with_date: Last backup {date}. A backup lets you restore everything if you change your mind.
clear_backup_sub_never: You have never exported a backup. Without one, deletion cannot be undone.
clear_reduced_motion_btn: Yes, I am sure — delete everything
toast_export_unavailable: Backup unavailable — try Settings → Export Full Backup
toast_category_name_duplicate: A category named "{name}" already exists — pick a different name.
recall_sheet_lead: Recall {n} codes from {name}? Only do this if you're SURE the recipient never imported the package. If they did, you'll have duplicates.
recall_reduced_motion_btn: Yes, I am sure — recall codes
demo_sheet_lead: This will add ~300 sample codes, 3 voucher categories, and a few sample contacts. The categories will be tagged "PRACTICE" so you can identify and remove them later. Best used on a fresh install.
settings_team_send_sub_pending: Waiting for {n} teammate{s} to complete pairing first
toast_send_blocked_pending: Waiting for {n} teammate{s} to complete pairing — once verified, you can send codes
toast_send_blocked_no_slaves: Invite a teammate first — Settings → Manage team → Show invite QR
settings_status_report_sub_waiting: Available once Owner confirms your pairing
toast_status_blocked_unverified: Status report unavailable — Owner hasn't confirmed your pairing yet
cat_url_help:
When shared, each code becomes:
Hi {name}, here is your code: ABC123
https://...?code=ABC123
toast_backup_shared: Backup ready — choose where to save it
toast_team_backup_shared: Team backup ready — store it safely (contains team key)
toast_csv_shared: CSV ready — choose where to save it
cat_owner_helper_team: Team scope — codes from this category can be sent to teammates.
cat_owner_helper_personal: Single scope — these codes stay on this phone only.
toast_only_master_can_demote: Only Owner can change category ownership
toast_cannot_demote_codes_out: {n} codes from this category are still with {names}. Recall or wait for confirmation, then try again.
toast_cant_switch_unverified: Mode locked — waiting for Owner to verify your pairing
clear_demo_lead: This will remove {cats} practice categories and {codes} sample codes. Your real data is untouched.
settings_online_sync_sub_off: Off — share .pcm files manually via WhatsApp / email
toast_online_sync_off: Online sync disabled — using file share
toast_online_sync_register_failed: Could not connect to sync server: {err}
toast_cloud_send_failed_falling_back: Cloud send failed ({reason}) — sharing file instead
toast_transfer_sent_via_cloud: Transfer sent to {name} via cloud sync
pairing_cta_sub: Send a small confirmation file to Owner so they can verify your pairing. Until verified, you can't receive transfers or send status reports.
join_ack_later_cta: You can resend the join confirmation anytime — tap the Team banner and use Complete pairing
toast_join_ack_sent_cloud: Join confirmation sent to {name} via cloud — wait for verification
toast_join_ack_sent_file: Join confirmation file shared — Owner imports it to verify your pairing
toast_join_ack_share_cancelled: Not sent — open Team and tap Complete pairing to retry
toast_join_ack_build_failed: Could not build join confirmation — try again from Team
pairing_cta_master_waiting_title: Waiting for a teammate to join
pairing_cta_master_waiting_sub: Share your invite QR with a teammate in person. They scan it, then send a confirmation back — and you're paired.
pairing_cta_master_pending_sub: Your teammate has the team key but hasn't sent their confirmation yet. Ask them to open Team and tap Send confirmation, or re-share the invite QR.
toast_pairing_verified_sent_cloud: Verification sent to {name} via cloud — pairing completes on their next sync
toast_pairing_verified_sent_file: Verification file shared — distributor imports it to complete pairing
toast_pairing_verified_later: You can resend the verification later from Team → Resend verification next to {name}
pro_online_active: Pro Online is active — cloud sync unlocked.
offline_sub: Pro Offline · team mode, file-based sharing
toast_no_team_codes_to_transfer: No available codes in any team category to send
toast_no_team_categories: Create a team category first — only team codes can be sent to teammates
lead_request_codes: Pick a team category and how many you need. The Owner gets a notification and can fulfill the request with one tap.
settings_request_codes_sub: Ask the Owner to send you a batch of codes from a team category
lead_incoming_requests: Distributors have asked you to send them codes. Tap Fulfill to open the send sheet pre-filled, or Dismiss to remove the request.
toast_no_team_categories_to_request: No team categories yet — Owner needs to create one first
settings_broadcast_sub: Let your team see how many codes remain per category
settings_broadcast_sub_last: Last broadcast {ago} — share remaining stock with team
lead_owner_broadcast: Send a snapshot of remaining team stock to every Distributor. They’ll see your numbers in their team-status panel.
banner_owner_broadcast_due_first: Broadcast inventory so the team sees current stock
banner_owner_broadcast_due_seen: Last broadcast {ago} — share remaining stock with team
toast_broadcast_sent_cloud_n: Broadcast sent to {n} teammate{s} via cloud
toast_broadcast_partial_falling_back: Cloud delivered to {ok}, {fail} failed — share file with the rest
toast_broadcast_no_distributors: No Distributors in your team yet
lead_status_help: The status line under each category shows live counts.
status_help_available_body: Codes still in your inventory, ready to give out.
status_help_used_body: Promo codes you've already handed to a customer or recipient.
status_help_issued_body: Vouchers you've handed out — printed or shared. The customer might or might not have redeemed them yet.
status_help_redeemed_body: Vouchers you scanned back when the customer actually used them. This is a subset of "issued" — once you’ve redeemed a voucher it’s no longer pending.
lead_unlock_pro_v2: One-time purchase. No subscriptions. End-to-end encrypted either way.
paywall_feat_team_mode: Team mode — up to 2 phones, end-to-end encrypted
paywall_feat_partners: Partner customer database with redemption tracking
paywall_online_silent: Silent automatic sync — no WhatsApp, no share sheets
paywall_online_request: Distributors can request codes; Owner taps Fulfill
paywall_online_live: Live team-status panel showing every member's stock
paywall_online_privacy: Still end-to-end encrypted. The relay can't read your codes.
paywall_distrib_free: Distributor phones are free via Owner's invite. Owner pays once.
paywall_default_reason: Unlock the full app: team mode, partner database, unlimited codes.
version_mismatch_text: {who} is on app v{ver}. Update yours for full compatibility.
tour_welcome_body: A 30-second tour so you know where everything lives. You can replay this anytime from Settings.
tour_category_body: Tap here to switch between code categories or create a new one. Categories group codes by app, campaign, or partner.
tour_help_body: Wondering what "available", "issued", or "redeemed" means? Tap this question mark anytime to find out.
tour_add_body: Paste a list, import a CSV file, or type codes one by one. Voucher categories generate fresh vouchers each time.
tour_history_body: Every code you give out, recall, or share is logged. Tap here to review individual codes and recipients.
tour_reports_body: Charts and per-category breakdowns of your distribution activity. Team Owners also see each Distributor's stock.
tour_team_body: If you have 2+ phones distributing codes for the same business, team mode lets them share securely — either by file or with silent cloud sync. Tap "Try team preview" on the welcome card to see it without a second phone.
tour_done_body: That’s the whole app. Tap the "?" anytime, or replay this tour from Settings.
settings_tour_sub: A short overlay tour of the main controls
hero_team_preview_sub: See team mode without a second phone — read-only sample data
lead_demo_team: See how team mode looks without setting up a second phone.
demo_team_bullet_member: A fake teammate "Demo Phone" added to your roster
demo_team_bullet_panel: The team-status panel populated with their stock
demo_team_bullet_request: A pending code request you can practice fulfilling
demo_team_note: Read-only — sending real codes to "Demo Phone" won't go anywhere. Tap "Exit demo" anytime to wipe it.
demo_team_warning: ⚠ Demo only works on a fresh install. If you've added real codes or set up a real team, please clear that first.
demo_team_banner_text: Team mode preview — read-only sample data
demo_req_note: Running low — could you send me 10 more?
toast_demo_team_needs_fresh_install: Demo preview only works on a fresh install. Please clear your data first.
